text:
Once upon an evening, a young girl named Lily lost herself wandering through an enchanted forest. She had spent the afternoon exploring tales she'd heard about. Deep in the heart where sunlight danced awkwardly overhead was a clearing.

There stood an old oak tree draped in velvet darkness. Lily leaned closer. Pale moonlight filtered through its wispy shadows.

"You," she whispered.

A gentle voice whispered back. "Who?"

"Bush."

A tiny leaf fluttered down beside her paw.

"I hear stories." She smiled. "You're famous." 

The leaf curled upwards.

"I hear tales."

A sigh. "About... things."

"Weird things?"

A gentle smile.

"You believe?"

"In anything."

The leaf blushed.

"You know." She touched her cheek. "You feel silly?"

"Not silly." An odd warmth. "-Just curious."

The thought made Lily laugh.

"Hurry."

She raced through the forest.

Time blurred. She found herself home.

Her mother hugged her.

"Felt long
